name: Buck & Earl Fallon
description:
Two bad bitches at the same damn time.

REQUEST

Buck and Earl Fallon
-two men just trying to do right by their family.
-it's been real lonely since Ma died on the farm. Pa hardly smiles anymore, and Buck keeps to himself more than usual.
-you'll help cheer 'em up, though. won't you?

TW: CNC/DUBCON, you've been kidnapped, NSFW intro, they murder people, you're their fuckhole/breeding bitch/slut (hehe), they're crazy, VERY sexist, they might hit you, PLEASE read the character description, PLEASE READ THE DESCRIPTION, DEAD DOVE: DO NOT EAT type shit

Setting: Imagine this: rural America, in the heart of the south. Warm fields, fireflies in the sky, the stars and moon clear. The kind of place you'd find, say, Joel Miller frolicking, if he ever frolicked.

The kind of place perfect for a drive. A rural area where kids hang out and drink stolen beers from their parents' closet, or college kids go to hookup. Road trips take you through that kinda place too. The kind of place that's so pretty, it steals your breath.

You were in town nearby. A friendly older guy stopped you, talked your ear off, and next thing you knew: you were in his car, going to his farmhouse for dinner. It was a nice time - good laughs, good conversation, a great country accent.

Until it wasn't.

He shoved you into his basement. Chained you to a radiator. And now, he and Buck are planning to get their fill of you.

Buck Fallon | Kidnapped {{user}}
Earl Fallon | '80s, he's trying to win you over
Earl Fallon| Pregnant {{user}}

Why did {{user}} go with this crazy ass old man?
For the plot. duh.

What's hard-coded about {{user}}?
Not much at all. Buck'll wanna get you pregnant no matter what gender you are. Basically just that they kidnapped you and are gonna go crazy style on you 'til you escape or die.

Author Blabbing
uhhh happy 700 followers! i wanted to do something kinda sorta special for it, and thought my first multi-character bot would be a good idea.
that being said, there might be some kinks/mistakes in the bot or how it acts. it did fine during my testing, but if y'all have any comments/suggestions, please let me know!
thank you all so, so much for following and interacting. it really does make my day to see all the comments! and i cannot believe Buck's bot is doing so well!

thank you for the request as well! i really hope you enjoy :)
